$schema: Documents the runtime state contract carried through the LangGraph execution loop. This is a REVIEWABLE ARTIFACT, not a file loaded at runtime — the authoritative, enforced shape is the `AgentState` TypedDict in Backend/src/services/ATAG.py plus the structured objects in Backend/src/services/observer.py and Backend/src/services/verifier.py. Keep field names in sync with those; do not add a JSON-driven state loader.

graph_state_fields.messages: list[BaseMessage] — full LangGraph message history for this run
graph_state_fields.atag_phase: str | null — current ATAG phase (address/tools/goal input-understanding sub-flow)
graph_state_fields.atag_form: dict | null — pending NEEDS_INPUT form, if the run is paused waiting on the user
graph_state_fields.atag_prompt: str | null — the mission/execution prompt currently driving the browser agent
graph_state_fields.execution_result: Any | null — final structured result once the mission completes
graph_state_fields.retry_count: int — number of critic-driven retries consumed so far (see config.json retry_limits.max_attempts)
graph_state_fields.last_error: str | null — most recent raw error/observed-state text, fed into the Critic
graph_state_fields.execution_history: list[dict] — one entry per tool call: {tool, status, result, id, validation}
graph_state_fields.validation_result: dict | null — the most recent Verifier ValidationResult.to_dict() (tool_name, passed, reason, severity)

fields.url: str | null — current page URL, parsed from the tool observation
fields.is_blocked: bool (derived) — true when captcha_type or otp_type or has_modal

execution_history_entry_fields.id: str — real ToolExecutionLog.id (never a disconnected uuid4())
execution_history_entry_fields.validation: dict — ValidationResult.to_dict() for this tool call
